job_postings.description: Riverfront Boutique is seeking a friendly Part-Time Sales Associate to assist customers, process transactions, and support daily store operations. Retail experience is preferred but not required.
Blue Peak Marketing is hiring a full-time Account Executive to manage client relationships, identify new opportunities, and coordinate campaign delivery.
BrightBridge IT Solutions seeks a full-time IT Support Specialist to provide remote and on-site technical support for small business clients.
Join Blue Peak Marketing as a Digital Marketing Intern and gain hands-on experience with social media, content creation, and analytics.
CityView Accounting Services is hiring a full-time Office Administrator to manage front desk operations, scheduling, and client communications.
Taylor Consulting Group is seeking an experienced HR Consultant for a contract engagement supporting multiple small business clients.
Green Leaf Wellness Spa is looking for a part-time receptionist to greet clients, manage bookings, and support daily spa operations.
The Rivertown Chamber is building a pool of temporary event staff to support the 2026 Annual Gala & Awards Night.
Blue Peak Marketing is hiring a Social Media Specialist to plan, create, and optimize social content for a portfolio of local business clients.
Riverfront Boutique previously sought a full-time Store Manager to oversee daily operations, merchandising, and staff supervision.

deals.title: 25% Off Cybersecurity Assessment
deals.description: Members receive 25% off a comprehensive cybersecurity and network vulnerability assessment from BrightBridge IT Solutions.
deals.terms: Valid for new assessment engagements only. Cannot be combined with other offers. One assessment per member business.

deals.title: 20% Off Website & SEO Audit
deals.description: Chamber members save 20% on a full website and SEO audit package from Blue Peak Marketing.
deals.terms: Offer applies to standard audit package only. Deposit required at booking. Must reference code when scheduling.

deals.title: 30% Off Weekday Team Lunch Package
deals.description: Book a weekday team lunch for 6 or more guests and receive 30% off food at Rivertown Bistro.
deals.terms: Valid Monday–Friday between 11:30 AM and 2:30 PM. Excludes alcohol and gratuity. Reservation required at least 24 hours in advance.

deals.title: 10% Off Coffee & Pastries
deals.description: Show your chamber affiliation and receive 10% off any coffee and pastry combo at Market Street Café.
deals.terms: Valid weekdays only before 11:00 AM. Not valid with other promotions.

deals.title: 15% Off Regular-Priced Apparel
deals.description: Enjoy 15% off all regular-priced clothing at Riverfront Boutique.
deals.terms: Excludes sale items and gift cards. Must present code at checkout.

deals.title: 20% Off First Print Order for Members
deals.description: New chamber member customers receive 20% off their first print order at Downtown Print & Copy.
deals.terms: Minimum order of $50 before discount. Limit one per member account.

deals.title: 25% Off First-Year Bookkeeping for Startups
deals.description: Startup businesses less than two years old receive 25% off their first year of monthly bookkeeping with CityView Accounting Services.
deals.terms: Applies to new clients only. Twelve-month service agreement required. Startup documentation may be requested.

deals.title: 18% Off Employee Appreciation Massage Packages
deals.description: Reward your team with 18% off multi-session massage packages at Green Leaf Wellness Spa.
deals.terms: Minimum purchase of 5 sessions. Advance booking required. Subject to therapist availability.

deals.title: 22% Off New Device Onboarding
deals.description: Save 22% on setup and onboarding for up to 10 new devices with Northside Tech Support.
deals.terms: Covers standard configuration and security setup. Additional travel fees may apply for on-site visits outside city limits.

deals.title: Buy One Entrée, Get 50% Off Second (Lunch)
deals.description: Buy one lunch entrée and get the second of equal or lesser value 50% off at Main Street Grill & Chophouse.
deals.terms: Valid Monday–Friday, 11:00 AM–2:00 PM. Discount applied to lower-priced entrée. Dine-in only.

deals.title: Free Diagnostics on Computer Repairs
deals.description: Get free diagnostics on any computer repair service at QuickFix Computer Repair.
deals.terms: Diagnostics fee waived with approved repair. No cash value.

deals.title: 20% Off Strategic Planning Session
deals.description: Chamber members receive 20% off a half-day strategic planning session with Taylor Consulting Group.
deals.terms: Subject to consultant availability. Discount applies to standard half-day session rate only.
